zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Stourton於大約1290年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾斯圖頓時，他的父親Ralph de Stourton41歲，母親Alice de Berkeley27歲。他和Joan Vernon至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1343年之後在英國英格蘭薩默塞特布盧頓，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特查爾頓 姆斯格洛福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Stourton于大约1290年出生在英国英格兰維爾爾斯圖頓时，他的父亲Ralph de Stourton41岁，母亲Alice de Berkeley27岁。他和Joan Vernon至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1343年之后在英国英格兰薩默塞特布盧頓，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特查爾頓 姆斯格洛福。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stourton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  English: locative name from any of three places named Stourton (Staffs, Wilts, Warwicks).
3 English: locative name, perhaps occasionally from Storrington (Sussex), which is recorded as Storgetune in 1086.

variants.name: Sturton
meanings: 1  English: locative name from Sturton le Steeple (Notts), Great Sturton (Lincs), Sturton by Stow (Lincs), or possibly Sturton (Northumb), all of which place-names share the same etymology and early spellings as   Stratton  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Stourton was born about 1290, in Stourton, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Ralph de Stourton, was 41 and his mother, Alice de Berkeley, was 27. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Joan Vernon. He died after 1343, in Bruton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Stourton est né environ 1290, à Stourton, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph de Stourton, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Alice de Berkeley, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Joan Vernon. Il est décédé après 1343, à Bruton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, England: Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als William de Stourton um 1290 in Stourton, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph de Stourton 41 und seine Mutter Alice de Berkeley 27. Er hatte mit Joan Vernon mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb nach 1343 in Bruton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Stourton è nato il circa 1290 nel Stourton, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Ralph de Stourton, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Alice de Berkeley, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Joan Vernon. Morì dopo il 1343, nel Bruton, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Stourtonが約1290年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアストウルトンで生まれた時，父Ralph de Stourtonは41歳，母Alice de Berkeleyは27歳であった。彼はJoan Vernonとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1343年以後にイギリスイギリスソメルセトブルトンで死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトチャールトン ムスグローブにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Stourton(이)가 대략 1290년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 스토우르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph de Stourton(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Berkeley(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Joan Vernon(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1343년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 브루턴에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 찰턴 무스그로브에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Stourton nasceu aproximadamente 1290, em Stourton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ralph de Stourton, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Berkeley, tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Joan Vernon. Ele faleceu após 1343, em Bruton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Stourton родился около 1290 г. в местности стоуртон, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ralph de Stourton было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Alice de Berkeley, 27. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Joan Vernon. Он умер после 1343 г. в местности брутон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности чарлтон мусгров, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.
